cities.name: The Great Bastion
cities.description: A massive fortress-city carved into a colossal mountain — grand stone arches, tiered terraces, and monolithic towers of granite.

cities.name: Obsidian Deep
cities.description: A subterranean metropolis lit by magma vents, where black glass spires rise from caverns older than the domains themselves.

cities.name: The Weeping Grove
cities.description: Petrifed trees weep amber sap beneath a perpetual twilight canopy, guarding druidic ruins swallowed by moss and silence.

cities.name: Sunken Oakhaven
cities.description: Half-drowned halls of oak and coral where tide-priests commune with leviathans in chambers flooded by moonlit seawater.

cities.name: The Abyssal Citadel
cities.description: A fortress suspended over a trench so deep that light dies before it reaches the bottom — chains of bioluminescent kelp hold the walls aloft.

cities.name: Siren's Hollow
cities.description: Wind-carved sea caves echo with forbidden songs; decks wager their sanity to harvest void pearls from the singing depths.

cities.name: Brimstone Hold
cities.description: Basalt ramparts ring a caldera lake of molten sulfur, where forge-clans temper weapons in rivers that never cool.

cities.name: Cinderfall
cities.description: Ruins of a sky-bridge city collapsed into ash canyons — ember storms still replay the night the Void cracked the realm open.

cities.name: The Iron Foundry
cities.description: Industrial cathedrals of iron and flame where golem hearts are cast; smoke pillars mark the border between craft and conquest.

cities.name: The Eyrie of Whispers
cities.description: Floating monoliths tethered by storm chains; wind-mages trade secrets that can unravel a deck before the first card is drawn.

cities.name: Zephyr's End
cities.description: The last plateau before the eternal hurricane — shattered airships litter the cliffs like warnings to those who chase the horizon.

cities.name: The Cloud Sanctuary
cities.description: Gothic spires drift on crystalline clouds, sanctifying pilots who dare the void vortex with vows written in lightning.
